description_long: This is a rectangular wooden coffee table with a two-tone design, featuring a dark brown wood grain top and a light gray painted base. The table has a sturdy frame with four straight legs and a lower section that includes two front-facing drawers, each with a small round handle. The drawers are symmetrically aligned and provide storage space, making the table both functional and decorative. The sides and back of the table are solid panels without any openings or additional features. The overall construction suggests durability and a classic, urban-friendly style suitable for living rooms, lobbies, or waiting areas.
description: A rectangular coffee table with a dark wood top, light gray base, and two front drawers with round handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two drawers with round handles and the full tabletop.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid panel side and the wood grain top, with no drawers visible.
description_view_2: Identical to the front view, showing both drawers and the tabletop.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the solid panel side and the wood grain top, with no drawers visible.
